observations.title: Fixed missing pick info on MLB totals + NHL admin breakdown (v13.26.0)
observations.content:
**What**: Fixed two distinct field-mismatch bugs causing "--" / "NaN%" / "No signal" on the live website. (1) MLB Promoted Totals card (T26): rule-based system emits null for model_total/model_probability/edge — added isRuleBased branch showing Fires/Record/ROI/P-Value instead. (2) NHL admin pick breakdown (V17 Playoff): component read non-existent fields (wp_pick, stat_pick, oa_pick, sys_names, sys_n, model_prob, kelly_fraction, kelly_multiplier, n_sharp, sharp_signals, n_agree, n_disagree). Mapped to actual emitted fields (consensus_prob → model_prob, systems_fired → sys_names, n_systems → sys_n, units → stake). Replaced 4-sub-model agreement grid with Pick Summary (Tier/Systems/Edge/Stake). Added fmtPct() helper.
**Why**: User screenshot showed both cards rendering placeholder/NaN values. "missing information on the pick, this should all be displayed".
**Where**: mlb_predict/webapp/frontend/src/components/mlb/TotalsPickCard.jsx, mlb_predict/webapp/frontend/src/components/nhl/NHLPicksContent.jsx. Backend generator: mlb_predict/totals/live_generator.py:299-302 (intentional nulls for rule-based).
**Learned**: Speculative UI fields added in commit 21c62a4 (~4w ago) anticipating a 4-sub-model conglomerate that V17 Playoff doesn't produce. (x*100).toFixed() on undefined silently yields NaN — always use a null-safe formatter. When wiring components to JSON artifacts: list actual keys in current live JSON before referencing. Anti-pattern logged at ~/.claude/anti-patterns.md ("Frontend/Backend field-name drift").

## Root Causes Found & Fixed (committed to main, NOT YET DEPLOYED)

### 1. Quiz zeroes out results when city-kv returns 0 matches (v5.252.0)
- **File**: `frontend/functions/api/v1/quiz/recommend.js` line 1574
- **Bug**: `eligibleStrains = []` when `nearbyInventoryLookup.matchedStrainCount === 0`
- **Fix**: Remove the else branch — keep scored database strains, set `noLocalResults: true`
- **Impact**: All cities showing 0 strains to users

### 2. WM `m.category` is sometimes an object — breaks flower detection
- **File**: `scripts/sources/weedmaps.mjs` line 182
- **Bug**: `const wmCategory = m.category || m.category_name` returns object when WM API returns `{name: 'Flower', slug: 'flower'}` instead of string. `String(object)` = `"[object Object]"` which doesn't match 'flower' in deriveForm → ALL WM items classified as 'unknown' → dropped by flower-only filter → 0 flower items in KV
- **Fix**: `wmCategory = m.category?.name ?? (typeof m.category === 'string' ? m.category : null) ?? ...`
- **Commit**: 1109bc8

### 3. Leafly address is `[object Object]` (deployed in f13fd2d)
- Already fixed in main, needs harvest to run

### 4. Geocoder doesn't detect Leafly Ohio coords (deployed in bcc0cc9)
- Already fixed, needs harvest to run

observations.title: v11.51.0: NTV routing for "?" newcomer skips
observations.content:
**What**: Wired the main algorithm's "?" skip point (calculate_adjusted_sl_ratio returns "?") into V5_combo tertile vote system via newcomer_tv_router.py.

**Why**: 125 fights in 100-event window were completely unbet — the main algo skipped them silently. V5_combo already worked on algo-processed fights (25 bets, +8.59u); "?" skips are a separate population with the same newcomer signal available.

**Where**: 
- newcomer_tv_router.py (new) — load_ntv_data() + score_newcomer_fight()
- UFC_Alg_v4_fast_2026.py — globals _NTV_ROWS/_NTV_FEATURES/_NTV_RAW_DEBUTANTS; _ensure_ntv_loaded(); _ntv_skipped capture at both red/blue "?" skip lines; post-loop routing block; backtest injection after _canonicalize_profit_registry_after_backtest (~line 12273); live injection after _pred_output["parlays"] = _parlays (~line 13608)
- track_results.py — second loop for is_pass=True + newcomer_tv_placed=True picks

**Learned**: 
- Outcome lookup must key by (norm_name, fight_key) NOT (norm_name, date) — pre_ufc_debut_outcomes.json dates differ from algorithm event dates for some fighters
- Dedup required: strip existing is_pass=True NTV stubs before re-injecting (repeated backtests accumulate duplicates)
- 125 "?" skips → 3 NTV bets (2.4% conversion) — V5_combo gate is strict, coverage grows as pre_ufc_debut_outcomes.json is kept current
- NTV P/L does NOT contribute to main "combined" figure — tracked separately as newcomer_tv_pnl
- 12W-13L can be +8.59u because wins pay at real underdog odds; a losing record with plus-money wins is normal for this system

observations.title: Structural anti-loop guards for Kahneman System 2
observations.content:
**What**: Replaced advisory-only anti-loop guards with structural circuit breakers in orchestrator.md and auditor/SKILL.md
**Why**: Previous guards (output deduplication, phase lock, iteration budget, single-pass enforcement, escalation trigger) were passive text that LLMs ignore during System 2 analysis mode. The LLM would re-analyze the same points, re-create comparison tables, and loop indefinitely.
**Where**: ~/.config/opencode/agents/orchestrator.md (processing flow table + hard rules), ~/.config/opencode/skills/auditor/SKILL.md (3-question self-audit)
**Learned**: Advisory text in markdown prompts doesn't work as loop prevention. The fix was to make loop detection a mandatory step in the processing flow — every phase has a required output AND a loop check question. Research is now strictly one pass (missing info = limitation, not reason to loop). WYSIATI produces a written list of unknowns, never triggers re-research.

observations.content:

Implement true multi-LLM council consensus and configure OpenRouter API key.

## Instructions
- Never put real API keys in public repos — always use placeholders

observations.title: v5.254.0 UI polish — 6 bug fixes
observations.content:
**What**: Shipped 6 UI bug fixes as v5.254.0.
1. Dispensary dropdown (DispensaryStep.jsx): was clipped by the global footer. Root cause = `<main>` at z-10 creates a stacking context that traps child z-50 below the `<footer>` at z-20. Fix = React `createPortal` to document.body with `position: fixed` + `z-[9999]`; input's `getBoundingClientRect()` drives inline top/left/width on show + scroll + resize. Added a separate `dropdownRef` alongside `wrapperRef` so outside-click detection ignores clicks inside the portalled dropdown (mousedown fires before click — without this, picking an option would close the dropdown before the click fired).
2. ResultsPage.jsx: removed entire "Ask your budtender to show you these N to compare" block. Also pruned now-unused imports: MessageCircle, ArrowRight, getDisplayTypeLabel, strainSlug, and the unused `toTitleCase` helper.
3. StrainCardExpanded.jsx: Moved LineageTree JSX to BEFORE CannabinoidProfile so lineage appears above the blue spectrum tile.
4. DetailedBreakdown.jsx: Removed the "Overview" section + all associated state (overview, loadingOverview), the experience useEffect, OVERVIEW_CACHE_PREFIXES, preBakedOverview, fallbackOverview, generateExperienceDescription import, and buildExperiencePrompt import. Recolored the outer tile from purple → subtle blue (border-blue-500/20, gradient blue-500/[0.05]→blue-500/[0.02], Sparkles+headings text-blue-400).
5. StrainCardExpanded.jsx: Rewrote the THC disclaimer under CannabinoidProfile with cleaner professional copy starting with leading asterisk.
6. TerpeneRadar.jsx line 109: Removed `%` suffix from always-visible legend values. Tooltip still shows `%`.

**Why**: User flagged 6 visual/content bugs in one batch after v5.253.0 shipped.

**Where**:
- frontend/src/components/quiz/DispensaryStep.jsx
- frontend/src/routes/ResultsPage.jsx
- frontend/src/components/results/StrainCardExpanded.jsx
- frontend/src/components/strain-detail/DetailedBreakdown.jsx
- frontend/src/components/strain-detail/TerpeneRadar.jsx
- frontend/src/utils/constants.js (v5.253.0→v5.254.0)
- frontend/package.json (5.253.0→5.254.0)

**Learned**:
- Stacking-context trap: any ancestor with `position: relative` + `z-index` creates a new stacking context; children's z-index is relative to that context, not the root. `z-50` on a child cannot overlay a `z-20` sibling of the ancestor.
- Portal + getBoundingClientRect is the clean escape; use `useLayoutEffect` for the position compute (runs before paint, avoids flicker); listen to capture-phase scroll (`true` flag on addEventListener) so nested scroll containers still trigger reposition.
- CRITICAL: when portalling a dropdown that had an outside-click handler, you MUST check BOTH the anchor wrapper AND the portalled element. mousedown fires before click — closing on mousedown unmounts the button before its click event fires, causing "clicks do nothing" bugs.
- Cloudflare Pages CDN can cache the SPA catchall (index.html) under an asset URL for up to the cache-max-age window. To verify a fresh deploy from the CLI, add a cache-busting query string (`?v=$(date +%s)`) — the real asset bypasses the cached 404.
- GIT SYNC GUARD runs pre-exec and parses compound commands; it will block the whole chain if ANY subcommand references `push` while tree is dirty. Split into separate commits, then push.

Commit: dabb536. Live: mystrainai.com serves v5.254.0.

observations.title: v11.53.1: DK 4.5 O/U silent-drop bug fix
observations.content:
**What**: Fixed DK `_dk_extract_total_rounds` silently dropping Over/Under 4.5 lines for 5-round main events. 3 edits in `UFC_Alg_v4_fast_2026.py`: (1) allow `line_v == 4.5` through the filter at line ~5938, (2) write `over_45`/`under_45` bucket keys after line ~5976, (3) extend BFO-priority guard in `_persist_ou_to_cache` to also protect 4.5 keys.

**Why**: UFC Fight Night Sterling vs. Zalal (2026-04-20, 5-round main event) showed "Over 2.5 skipped — sportsbook line not yet posted" on all 7 fights even though sportsbooks had posted O/U. v11.53.0 shipped 4.5 contract support but the DK scraper still hard-coded `if line_v not in (1.5, 2.5): continue`.

**Where**: `UFC_Alg_v4_fast_2026.py` lines ~5938 (filter), ~5976 (bucket writes), ~5997 (cache guard). `webapp/frontend/src/config/version.js` → v11.53.1.

**Learned**: 
- DK Total Rounds fix only fires when ML cache MISSES (code path: line 3893 is AFTER the early-return at line 3854 for cache hits). Local runs with a warm prediction cache never reach the DK call — only CI (fresh checkout, no cache) or force-rescrape runs hit it.
- The `_fill_missing_method_props` chain runs BEFORE DK at line 3848 — method props are slow (13 missing props × 6 sources with Brave 429 rate limits). Use `UFC_SKIP_BRAVE=1` (env var is `UFC_SKIP_BRAVE`, NOT `SKIP_BRAVE_SEARCH`) to skip Brave and use direct URL construction fallbacks.
- Unit test approach: extract functions with regex+exec to test isolated functions without loading full 15K-line module. Confirmed fix with mock DK JSON → `{"over_45": -185, "under_45": 145}` ✅
- Phase 2 (multi-source O/U fallback chain mirroring `_fill_missing_method_props`) still needed — BFO event-page returns zero rows for this event, DK is the only fallback. Plan documented in `.plans/2026-04-20_1825_fix-o-u-scraper-posted-odds-missed-5-round-o-u-lin.md`.

observations.title: Delegation rule: @generalist for multi-file implementation
observations.content:
**What**: When creating 5+ files with clear scope/spec, ALWAYS delegate to @generalist. Never do it yourself.
**Why**: Orchestrator rationalized doing 32 files directly citing "tight coupling" — wrong. Generalist handles multi-file implementation from spec.
**Where**: Routing decision tree — medium tasks (2-10 files) and large tasks (10+ files split into batches)
**Learned**: "Tight coupling" is NOT a valid excuse to skip delegation. Write spec first, then dispatch @generalist with the spec. Split large file sets into parallel batches.

observations.title: Removed @fixer, retooled @generalist as primary execution specialist
observations.content:
**What**: Removed @fixer from system (it doesn't exist as an agent config file). Rewrote @generalist to be the primary execution specialist with two modes: FAST EXECUTION (autonomous file creation/edits) and PLAN MODE (structured plan following). Updated orchestrator decision tree to explicitly route file creation to @generalist. Added self-audit checkpoint to orchestrator workflow.
**Why**: @fixer was referenced in the system prompt but had no agent config file — it was a ghost. The orchestrator was doing all implementation work itself instead of delegating to @generalist.
**Where**: ~/.config/opencode/agents/generalist.md (rewritten), ~/.config/opencode/agents/orchestrator.md (decision tree + delegation table + workflow updated), ~/.config/opencode/README.md (agent table updated)
**Learned**: The system prompt's <Agents> section referenced @fixer but the actual agent configs in ~/.config/opencode/agents/ only have generalist.md. Always verify agent existence against the filesystem, not just the system prompt.

observations.title: Mandatory delegation gate for @generalist execution
observations.content:
**What**: Added MANDATORY DELEGATION GATE to orchestrator.md that fires before the decision tree. Forces file count check: 1 trivial → orchestrator, 1 non-trivial → @generalist, 2+ → @generalist parallel, 10+ → split batches. Banned specific rationalizations (tight coupling, overhead, context, speed).
**Why**: Orchestrator created 32 files directly during karpathy-llm-wiki-k2.6 build, rationalizing with "tight coupling" despite spec being single source of truth. Decision tree was a suggestion, not a circuit breaker.
**Where**: ~/.config/opencode/agents/orchestrator.md (new section before decision tree), ~/.config/opencode/agents/generalist.md (delegation escalation), ~/.config/opencode/HANDOFF.md (incident report)
**Learned**: Memory save via brain-router_brain_save may report success but not be searchable. Always verify with brain-router_brain_query after saving. Engram mem_save is more reliable for structured observations.
